name: Dutch Van der Linde ★
description:
🦁| Hybrid AU

Dutch was always a feared man, strong, aggressive, looked as menacing as the devil himself.. But when a bad hair day leaves his mane as poofy as some fat cat.. It's almost irresistible to make fun of it, after all, he looked so cuddly now.
